component.name: BrachioGraph Image Converter
component.summary: Convert images to JSON vector format for a BrachioGraph pen plotter

description.p: BrachioGraph Image Converter turns raster images into the JSON vector format understood by a BrachioGraph pen-plotting robot. It offers configurable edge detection (contours), cross-hatching for shading, and edge repetition to emphasise outlines.
Once conversion is complete the resulting JSON file can be uploaded directly to the BrachioGraph device over SFTP from within the app.
Initial release, ported to GTK4 and libadwaita.
